questionHtml:
Ronald lives in New York City and wishes to fly to each of the other cities, before finally returning to New York City. After some research, he finds that there exists a direct flight between Los Angeles and Dallas costing $26. He updates the graph to show this.

Using only the edges obtained in your answer to part (b), find an upper bound for the travelling salesman problem.
markschemeHtml:
2×MST weight          (M1)

=$336          A1

 

Note: Allow any integer multiple (>1) of MST weight for M1, and if correctly calculated, award M1A1.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Using only the edges obtained in your answer to part (b), find an upper bound for the travelling salesman problem.
